summary: APPROVED — all 5 source changes correct, no architecture violations, no security issues; 6 non-blocking follow-ups filed.

qualityGates.name: correctness
qualityGates.detail: All 5 modified files (main.dart, Info.plist, route_map_preview.dart, live_map_widget.dart, live_map_body.dart) implement their specified behavior correctly. assert + non-null assertion in main.dart is correct. MBXAccessToken placed outside #ifdef ATS block in Info.plist. _mapLoadError gating and onMapLoadErrorListener wiring verified in both map widgets. removeCurrentSnackBar deduplication confirmed in live_map_body.dart.

qualityGates.name: architecture_compliance
qualityGates.detail: No domain, data, cubit, or android files modified. No BuildContext leaked outside widget layer. MapLoadingErrorEventData (Mapbox SDK type) is not exposed to consumers — only String message crosses the LiveMapWidget/LiveMapBody boundary. One widget per file rule satisfied. No HTTP calls in presentation.

qualityGates.name: no_security_violations
qualityGates.detail: Info.plist embeds a public Mapbox pk.* token — same token already shipped in every Android APK via manifest placeholder. Public tokens are read-only and designed for client-side embedding. No sk.* (secret) tokens present. No credentials, passwords, or private keys introduced.
